faq.question: IS THIS COURSE BEGINNER-FRIENDLY OR DO I NEED CODING EXPERIENCE?
faq.answer: This course is perfect for both beginners and experienced developers. We teach data science from the ground up including Python basics, data manipulation, and ML models. Even if you've never written a line of code before, you'll walk away confident and ready to tackle real-world data problems.

faq.question: WILL THIS WORK FOR MY GOAL (JOB, FREELANCE, STARTUP, ETC.)?
faq.answer: Yes — the frameworks we teach are industry-agnostic. Whether you want to get hired as a data analyst, freelance for businesses, or use data to grow your own startup, this course gives you the practical foundation and project portfolio to achieve it.

faq.question: WHAT IS YOUR REFUND POLICY?
faq.answer: We offer a 7-day no-questions-asked refund. If you go through the first two modules and don't feel the content delivers value, just email us and we'll refund 100% of your payment.

faq.question: HOW LONG DO I HAVE ACCESS TO THE CONTENT?
faq.answer: You get lifetime access to all course materials including future updates. Once enrolled, the content is yours forever including all project notebooks, templates, and the private community.

faq.question: DO I NEED A TECHNICAL BACKGROUND TO JOIN?
faq.answer: Absolutely not. This workshop is designed specifically for non-technical professionals — marketers, managers, HR professionals, business owners, students and anyone who wants to use AI without writing code. We start from zero and build up to advanced workflows step by step.

faq.question: WHICH AI TOOLS WILL WE COVER IN THE WORKSHOP?
faq.answer: We cover 20+ tools including ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, Notion AI, Zapier AI, Make.com, RunwayML, Canva AI, Perplexity, and several niche tools for specific job functions. You'll leave with a curated stack that fits your specific role and goals.

faq.question: HOW MUCH TIME DO I NEED PER WEEK?
faq.answer: The live sessions run 2 hours, twice a week for 4 weeks. You'll need an additional 1–2 hours per week for practice assignments. Everything is recorded so you can watch at your own pace if you miss a session.

faq.question: WILL THESE SKILLS STAY RELEVANT AS AI KEEPS CHANGING?
faq.answer: Yes — because we teach frameworks, not just specific tools. The prompt engineering principles, workflow design thinking, and automation mindset you'll learn apply to every AI tool that comes out. We also update the curriculum every quarter with the latest tools and techniques.

Senior ML Engineer at a top-tier AI research lab with 10+ years building deep learning systems deployed to millions of users.

He specialises in making complex ML concepts accessible through first-principles thinking and hands-on project-based learning.

faq.question: DO I NEED PRIOR ML EXPERIENCE TO JOIN?
faq.answer: You should be comfortable with Python and have basic familiarity with numpy and pandas. We cover ML foundations in Week 1, but this is not a beginner Python course. If you've done the Python for Data Science workshop or equivalent, you're ready.

faq.question: TENSORFLOW OR PYTORCH — WHICH ONE DO WE USE?
faq.answer: We focus primarily on PyTorch, which is now the dominant framework in research and increasingly in production. We also cover TensorFlow/Keras for deployment-specific use cases and show you how to convert models between frameworks using ONNX.

faq.question: WILL I BE ABLE TO GET A JOB AFTER THIS?
faq.answer: This masterclass is designed to get you to the level where you can clear ML engineering interviews at top companies. We cover the exact topics asked in system design and coding rounds at Google, Amazon, Microsoft & Indian unicorns. Most importantly, you leave with a portfolio of production-grade projects that demonstrate real capability.

faq.question: HOW MUCH GPU/COMPUTING POWER DO I NEED?
faq.answer: None on your own machine. We use Google Colab Pro (we provide access as part of enrollment) for all training exercises. For the deployment projects, we use free tiers of AWS and GCP. You won't need to spend extra on compute.

faq.question: DO I NEED TO KNOW JAVASCRIPT BEFORE JOINING?
faq.answer: Yes — this program assumes you know JavaScript fundamentals: variables, functions, arrays, objects, promises and ES6+ syntax. If you're a complete beginner to coding, we recommend starting with our free JavaScript foundations course first and joining a future cohort.

faq.question: WHY TYPESCRIPT INSTEAD OF JAVASCRIPT?
faq.answer: Every serious tech company in India — Razorpay, Swiggy, CRED, Zepto — uses TypeScript in production. Learning TypeScript from day one means you learn the patterns that matter in real codebases, not ones you'll have to unlearn when you get a job. It also means fewer runtime bugs and faster debugging.

faq.question: HOW ARE THE PORTFOLIO PROJECTS STRUCTURED?
faq.answer: You'll build 3 projects across the 10 weeks: a task management API in Weeks 3–4, a full-stack e-commerce application in Weeks 5–7, and a capstone SaaS product of your choice in Weeks 8–10. Each project is reviewed by a senior engineer with written feedback you can share with recruiters.

faq.question: WHAT SALARY CAN I EXPECT AFTER COMPLETING THIS?
faq.answer: Fresh graduates with this portfolio and skills typically receive offers between ₹8–14L at product companies. With 1–2 years of prior experience, the range is ₹15–25L. We also provide placement support including resume reviews, mock interviews and direct referrals to our 100+ hiring partners.

title: Build Full-Stack Web Apps That Get You
short_description: Learn to build production-ready full-stack apps with React and Next.js — the same stack powering startups to Fortune 500 companies.
subtitle: Stop Building Todo Apps. Build & Deploy Real SaaS Products Employers Fight Over — In Just 6 Weeks.
instructor_bio:
Founder And Lead Instructor At CodingShark, Ravi Built His First SaaS Product At 19 And Has Since Helped 50,000+ Students Launch Real Web Projects.
He Has Shipped Over 200 Production Apps Using React & Next.js For Clients Across India, USA, And UAE.
His Teaching Style Cuts Through Framework Overwhelm And Gets You Building Real Things From Day One.
instructor_quote: The fastest way to get hired is to ship real products. We skip the theory and go straight to deployment.
why_join_items: Build 3 full-stack SaaS apps you can put on your portfolio immediately
Master the React + Next.js stack used by 90% of top Indian startups
Deploy to production with CI/CD, domains and SSL — not just localhost
Learn authentication, payments, and real-time features in one program
Get code review from senior engineers, not just AI-generated feedback
Access a private Discord with 5,000+ React developers for lifetime support

points: JSX, components, props, and state

faq.question: DO I NEED TO KNOW JAVASCRIPT BEFORE JOINING?
faq.answer: Yes, basic JavaScript knowledge (variables, functions, loops) is helpful. We cover TypeScript and React from scratch so you don't need prior experience with frameworks.

faq.question: WHAT WILL I BUILD DURING THE BOOTCAMP?
faq.answer: You'll build 3 full-stack projects: a task management SaaS, an e-commerce storefront with Stripe payments, and a real-time chat app — all deployed live with custom domains.

faq.question: WHAT IS YOUR REFUND POLICY?
faq.answer: We offer a 7-day no-questions-asked refund. If you go through the first two modules and don't feel the content delivers value, just email us and we'll refund 100% of your payment.

faq.question: HOW LONG DO I HAVE ACCESS?
faq.answer: You get lifetime access to all course materials, future updates, and the private community. Once enrolled, everything is yours forever.

title: Master DevOps & Cloud To Land

Ravi Has Architected Cloud Infrastructure For 50+ Indian Startups And MNCs Including FinTech, HealthTech, And EdTech Platforms.
He Has Led DevOps Teams At Scale — Managing Kubernetes Clusters Serving 5M+ Daily Active Users.
At CodingShark, He Breaks Down Complex Infrastructure Into Simple, Repeatable Blueprints Any Developer Can Follow.

why_join_items: Get hands-on with AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes — not just theory
Build a production-grade CI/CD pipeline from scratch in Week 2

title: Design Apps People Love & Get Paid
tagline: Master Figma · Design Systems · UX Research · Prototyping
short_description: Learn the exact design process top product designers use at Swiggy, Zepto, and funded startups — and land your first design role.
subtitle: From Zero Design Skills To A Portfolio That Gets Callbacks From Top Startups In Just 5 Weeks.
instructor_bio:
Ravi Has Designed Over 150 Apps For Funded Startups And Fortune 500 Companies Across Fintech, HealthTech, And EdTech.
His Designs Have Driven 40%+ Increases In User Retention And 3x Growth In App Store Ratings For Multiple Clients.
At CodingShark, He Teaches The Design Thinking Process That Separates ₹6 LPA Beginners From ₹20 LPA Senior Designers.
instructor_quote: Design isn't about making things pretty. It's about making things work so well that users never have to think.
why_join_items: Build a 5-app portfolio using the same Figma process used at Swiggy & Zepto
Learn UX research — user interviews, journey maps, and usability testing
Master design systems so your designs scale across 100+ screens consistently
Get client-ready with freelance pricing, proposals, and portfolio presentation
Understand the handoff process developers actually love working with
Join a community of 2,000+ designers — get feedback on every project

faq.question: DO I NEED ANY DESIGN OR CODING EXPERIENCE?
faq.answer: Zero experience needed. We start from opening Figma for the first time and build up to professional-grade design systems. No coding is required — just a laptop and an internet connection.

faq.question: WHAT WILL MY PORTFOLIO LOOK LIKE AFTER THE COURSE?
faq.answer: You'll have 5 fully designed apps with written case studies covering research, wireframes, visual design, and user testing. These are the kind of portfolios that get callbacks from funded startups.

faq.question: WHAT IS YOUR REFUND POLICY?
faq.answer: We offer a 7-day no-questions-asked refund. If you go through the first two modules and don't feel the content delivers value, email us and we'll refund 100%.

faq.question: CAN I USE FIGMA FOR FREE?
faq.answer: Yes — Figma's free tier is all you need for this course. We don't require any paid tools. You can do the entire course, build your portfolio, and land your first client on the free plan.
